positive: A stylized, symmetrical mandala design featuring interconnected celestial elements and flora. The central motif is a stylized, geometric crescent moon cradling an abstract, bioluminescent nebula. Radial symmetry extends outwards with intricate patterns of stylized lotus flowers, zodiac symbols, and abstract cosmic dust clouds. Utilize deep indigo and vibrant sapphire blues as the primary background colors, contrasted sharply with metallic gold and iridescent turquoise accents. The overall aesthetic should be ethereal, mystical, and clean, suitable for a high-quality silkscreen print on black fabric. Composition should be centered and scalable, resembling a vintage cosmic tarot card print, with strong, graphic silhouettes.
negative: blur, text, logo, watermark, artifact, noise, low resolution, messy lines, dirty, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, poorly rendered, gradient noise
